title: gladiolus insolens
intro: Gladiolus insolens is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Naked Lily or the Wild Naked Lily, belonging to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin ailments. The health benefits of Gladiolus insolens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
